reviews.review_description: I love horror games, especially five nights at Freddy's ones and if you also do, then buy this game. Sure, there are some glitches, but not many, and the glitches just make the game funnier, it's not the jumpscares that are scary, it's the ambience making it scary. I love it
Game is good but i cant change language to english (i have it on chinesse)
This game is fun both modes but single player is a little more scary but it is fun but the horse is so freaking annoying though.
Honestly just wish the game was free. Or at least like 5 bucks cuz my friend doesn’t wanna get it cuz of the money.
This game is so fricking scary i craped myself the first night cause this huge dog just camped by the door and jumpscared me the 3rd time i checked. This game is insanely fun.
Please make a night 6

reviews.review_title: Best Multiplayer Game, Better than FNAF
reviews.review_description: This game is very scary and fun with lots of strategy and difficulty involved. I think it’s way better than FNAF help wanted because it has multiplayer. It’s very realistic and scary and so much fun with a friend!!

I love this game me and my little cousin were playing it. It was so fun and a little bit scary but the only thing is there were some glitches.I didn’t like but it’s still a five out of five. It’s a super fun game and it’s super scary too, but I really want to like make different nights not like custom night but like a fun night like custom your animatronics with different costumes like from the other animatronics .￼
I’m gonna be honest if you hear this game is very ￼mid it’s nothing more than a five nights at Freddy’s rip off very easy in multiplayer makes no sense. Go play help wanted 2 it’s way better
Really good game now but I don't remember the Olddays of this game no used to be called five nights no escape sad 😢
It’s an amazing game. It’s literally Fnaf help wanted but 10 times is better. ￼

The single player is really good, but sometimes when you go on multiplayer, it kind of bugs a little bit, and it doesn't make you click anything. But it's so it really great game, and I recommend that you buy it and have fun.
I love playing the game easy 5stars, although it is a little glitchy
Very fun with friends just spent the 5 quid
Decent game but why is the name FNAF? Name it five nights no escape the name is interpreted very badly do I call it FNAF do I call it horror what is the name of the game?

developer_response.body: Sorry for misguided information. We understand the confusion regarding the name. "FNAF" We'll take your suggestion into consideration for future updates to make the game experience clearer and more enjoyable. Our game officially named "Five Nights: No Escape" but within the clickable and searchable marketing issues, we need to make some changed on the cover and product name.We're really sorry if the name caused any misunderstanding.  If you have any more thoughts or suggestions, feel free to share them with us!

reviews.review_description: Drake appeared from the darkness and slapped me round the face with his sausage and said oil up baby girl
I can't figure it out. I want my money back.
Bad

It's really fun to play with my friend only complaint I have is sometimes it breaks and shows other players in my lobby where me and my friend are standing but I'm still able to play out the night. If I could suggest one feature it would be a ability to have up to four or more players instead of just the two

developer_response.body: Hi hthegamer, thank you for your valuable feedback. We really appreciate you taking the time to share your experience with us. We have relayed this bug report to our development team. They are actively working to resolve these multiplayer glitches and improve the overall stability.

reviews.review_title: This had diarrhea running up my back
reviews.review_description: Bro I got the demo but wanted to buy the whole thing so I did. And oh my gawd was I scared. I didn't stop throwing my controllers thinking I'd hit the animitronics 😂

developer_response.body:
Hi Gravy_Groovy,

Thank you for your feedback. Sounds like you had one heck of a time😂🔥! Just don't accidentally yeet your controllers into next week, alright? Keep on surviving those jump scares~

reviews.review_description: Some of the Graphics are a little cheesey, but they are great when they need to be and the jump scares are insane!!!! First game that truly made me jump out of my seat!!!! Definitely worth the purchase!!

developer_response.body: Hi Roculous9815, thank you for taking the time to play our game! We’re glad that you enjoyed the jump scares and that it was able to make you jump out of your seat! We understand that not all of the graphics may be to your liking, but we’re glad that you found the graphics to be great when they needed to be. Our team is constantly working to improve the graphics and we appreciate your feedback. Thanks again for your support and we hope to see you playing our games again soon!

reviews.review_description: It's a bit buggy and fairly basic in comparison to other fnaf fan games, but other than that... excellent! Between scary, gripping atmospheric noise, surprisingly solid graphics, and a fantastic co-op mode, for the price, I believe this game is well worth checking out. Sequel plans, perhaps...😏.

developer_response.body: Hi flyboy888, Thank you so much for your valuable feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you've found our game worth checking out and are enjoying it. We're always working to improve and provide the best experience possible, so your comments about the bugs are incredibly important to us. If you prefer, we'd love to hear more about the specific issues you encountered. Could you please consider joining our Discord community (https://discord.gg/noescape) or sending us an email to contact@vrsuplife.com? This will help us make the necessary improvements. Thanks again for your support!

reviews.review_description: I just got the game and the online cooperative mode doesn’t work at all and when I tried to get a refund I couldn’t. I haven’t even had the game for a day yet and it won’t refund!😡

developer_response.body: Hi Danny! Sorry to hear you're having trouble with the cooperative mode in the game. Can you provide more details about the issues you're encountering? Understanding the specific challenges you're facing will help me better assist you in troubleshooting and finding a solution. Looking forward to your response!

reviews.review_description: This game is actually fun and its great but theres just not enough players on and even if there was and i join a lobby it’s apparently “a friends lobby only” so can’t exactly enjoy multiplayer when theres hardly anyone on.

developer_response.body: Hi jonathanj2007, we’re glad to hear that you find our game fun and great, and we appreciate your feedback on the multiplayer experience. We understand that it can be frustrating when there aren’t enough players online or when you can’t join a lobby. We would like to invite you to join our Discord community (https://discord.com/invite/UpFwwnV6PZ) where you can find other horror fans to play with and communicate with other players to organize multiplayer matches. Hope you have fun in co-op :)

reviews.review_description:
https://youtu.be/ldtp7wAT_e0

Test on my Channel

developer_response.body:
Hi VR-Matters,
Thank you so much for your fantastic review and for sharing your gameplay experience on YouTube! We're thrilled to see our game being enjoyed and explored in such a creative way. Keep up the good work!

reviews.review_description:
It really does have the fnaf feel and is very scary.
I love multiplayer but I do wish you can have more nights after night 5 that keep getting harder. It would make the game really fun on multiplayer. (An addition) I would like in the multiplayer to have more of a teamwork based experience. The vent is perfect but I feel like one more thing would just make it that much more important to have teamwork.

developer_response.body:
Hi moosefreddy, thank you so much for your wonderful feedback! We completely understand your desire for more nights beyond Night 5, and we agree that adding additional, increasingly challenging nights could enhance the multiplayer experience. We’re always looking for ways to improve and expand the game, and your suggestion is definitely something we will consider for future updates.
Thank you for being a part of our community and for sharing your thoughts with us. Your input is invaluable as we work to make the game even more enjoyable. Stay tuned for more exciting content!
Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: Its so fun can you please add more details though thanks

developer_response.body:
Hi Hx4272, we're delighted to hear you're having fun with the game.
We appreciate your suggestion about adding more details. Your input is valuable to us as we continue to refine and improve the game experience. If you have specific ideas about what kind of details you'd like to see added, we'd love to hear more.
We invite you to join our Discord community(https://discord.gg/2G6Mb6UC3v) where you can share your thoughts in greater depth. It's a great place to connect with other players, discuss ideas, and provide more detailed feedback. Your insights could help shape future updates!
You can also stay updated on any new features or changes we implement based on player feedback like yours.
Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts. We're committed to making the game the best it can be, and player input is a crucial part of that process.

reviews.review_description: The game is fun but every time I play either solo or co-op it just quits the level around 1 am and doesn’t let me go any further

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the game, but sorry to learn about the issue occurring. We recommend trying restart your VR headset and re-enter the game, this should solve the issue in most cases. However, if the issue continues, we invite you to join our Discord server: https://discord.gg/2G6Mb6UC3v. Our support team is dedicated to helping you and will work with you one-on-one until we find a solution.

reviews.review_description: This game is so fun with the online features, although there are a few bugs, it is very suspenseful. Highly recommend buying.
Scary and fun

This is a fantastic idea – a co-op version of FNAF that is an absolute blast to play with friends. The chaos and frantic moments when you and your friend are scrambling around are just so much fun. The art style is also top-notch, and I absolutely love the animatronics in the game. I hope this studio continues to produce more horror games. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
Hi encoretan, thank you so much for your enthusiastic review! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the co-op experience and the chaotic fun it brings. It's great to know that the art style and animatronics have left such a positive impression - our team put a lot of effort into these aspects.
We're passionate about creating immersive horror experiences and have some exciting ideas in the pipeline.
If you'd like to stay updated on our latest news, upcoming features, and future titles, we invite you to join our Discord community (https://discord.gg/2G6Mb6UC3v). It's a great place to connect with other players, share your experiences, and get the latest updates directly from our team. We hope to see you there! Thank you again for your support. It's feedback like yours that motivates us to keep creating and improving our games!

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun in solo. I tried the demo and decided to get the full game. Highly recommend
I love it is so scary and I like the horse in the lobby room and the sound “creeeeek”

This game is soo much fun it dose have some bugs in it still and sometimes will lag out but the graphics are very good it is a bit different on single player but I love the fact that it is multiplayer because I don’t think there is a multiplayer five nights at Freddy’s. My advice is to more add levels, yes I get it it is based off of 5 nights at Freddy’s but you should add more things to do such as a parts in services that would be fun! You should also have the rat that is in the vents be able to take away power for 10 seconds on the 4th and 5th night like balloon boy and you should make a secret 6th night at the end just for the fun of it with sum sort of golden Freddy that eyes will light up before he try’s to come and get you and maybe you should make it 12.00$ if you add these updates any ways I would love to see these updates soon bc I love this game soo much thank you for reading this

developer_response.body: Hi BLUEAPPLEVRoffical, We’re thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying the game and appreciate your suggestions for improvements — we can't wait to bring even more fun to the game!

reviews.review_description: This is by far the best vr Fnaf knockoff ever! It is super fun to play with a friend, and I love the difficulty! The only minor problem is the bugs in the game, such as not being able to click the buttons or the doors not closing, but those don’t happen often! I love this game, as it is very cheap, and easy to learn. I recommend this game to horror game lovers and people who enjoy playing with others. Great game!

reviews.review_title: The game is good. Pls fixed Quest 1 port
reviews.review_description: The game was fun to play. There some small bugs like the audio of the phone call cutting out mid sentence. But it still alright. However I would like to see the Quest 1 version of the game to be fixed. Been planning on giving the quest 1 to a relative with the game. I have already explain the feedback on discord but in short. Games doesn't load the menu that has the single or co-op mode, all nights unlocked at the start, and there's no sound at all aside from the intro with company logo screen. I'm hoping that the Quest 1 version would get fixed soon.
This game is fun that I told my friend

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying the game and sharing it with your friends. Multiplayer aspect is always our favotite as it brings unforgettable moments and plenty of laughs. Happy gaming to you and your friends!

reviews.review_description: 5/5 game, this is the only Fnaf game that’s moltyplayer and it’s so fun with friends

reviews.review_title: Fun game if you have a friend
reviews.review_description: Fun cheap experience, there's a glitch where my mask disappears but it's NBD. Worth it if you like fnaf or just VR horror.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and for bringing up the mask glitch. Regarding the mask, it's designed to stay on as long as you're holding it. However, we realize this mechanic might not be the most convenient for players.
Good news – we've addressed this issue in our upcoming update! We're always working to improve the gameplay experience, and your feedback is invaluable in this process. Stay tuned for the next version, and thank you for your support and patience.

Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: HOW I CHANGE THE LANGUAGE TO ENGLISH

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for bringing this to our attention! We understand that our game currently determines the display language based on your device's system language, and does not offer an option for manual language switching. We suggest re-open the game or restart the device to see if it works while we are actively working to resolve and update this bug as soon as possible. Thank you again for your patience and understanding.
